hero_title: Your compass in a new European country
hero_sub: Legal, psychological and practical support for migrants — from documents to integration
hero_badge: Legal assistance · Poland & EU · Zero corruption
hero_ready_sub: Message us on WhatsApp — the first consultation is free. We will help you find the best path to legalization.
footer_about_text: Professional legal and practical assistance for migrants in Poland and the EU. Zero corruption. Strictly by the law.
faq_a_0: Yes, we store minimal data and require GDPR consent.
faq_a_1: We work strictly within the law; guarantees depend on the case.
faq_q_3: Which EU countries do you work in?
faq_a_3: Poland and other EU countries — please enquire.
faq_a_5: Discounts are possible — ask when contacting us.
how_step_0: Tell us your situation via WhatsApp or the form. We listen, assess and reply honestly — before any payment.
how_step_1: Together we find the best path. A clear action plan with options A and B — before we even start.
how_step_2: Payment confirms the start. Everything in writing, step by step, under your control. No surprises.
how_step_3: Your assistant is with you at every step. If something goes wrong — we analyse and move forward. We don't disappear.
how_step_4: Document or decision received. Case closed. You are safe — and you know what to do next.
svc_desc_0: Immediate suspension of proceedings. Appeals. Status protection.
svc_desc_1: First card, renewal, EU resident, citizenship.
svc_desc_2: Psychological support during adaptation and stress.
svc_desc_4: Child rights. School enrollment. Anti-discrimination protection.
svc_desc_5: Help with health insurance and social benefits.
svc_desc_6: Tenant rights. Resolving disputes with landlords.
svc_desc_7: Unpaid wages. Labour rights. Working conditions.
svc_desc_9: Legal support for relocation and legalization in Spain.
pricing_free_desc: Initial assessment of your situation. We'll tell you if we can help.
pricing_consult_desc: Full analysis. When ordering a service — deducted from the total.
pricing_hour_desc: Lawyer or specialist. Without VAT — cheaper than law firms.
exit_title: Wait! We have a gift for you
exit_desc: Leave your email and get a free consultation with our migration expert (worth 150 PLN).
exit_done_desc: Also check WhatsApp — we often respond faster:

pricing_hero_sub: The legal hour is the basic unit of interaction with a specialist. It covers consultations, situation analysis, document preparation, strategy formation and preparation for submission or interview.
pricing_modal_desc: The price is determined individually. Choose a convenient contact method — our specialist will respond within 2 hours:
pricing_lbl_agree: I accept the Terms and the processing of personal data
pricing_err_firstname: Enter first name in Latin characters (e.g. Ivan)
pricing_err_lastname: Enter last name in Latin characters (e.g. Petrenko)
pricing_step1_desc: Find the service in the table and click «Buy».
pricing_step2_desc: Fill in first name, last name, phone and email for receipt — in Latin characters.
pricing_step3_desc: Secure payment via Przelewy24 — card, BLIK, transfer. SSL 256-bit.
pricing_step4_desc: You receive an email receipt and a specialist contacts you within 2 hours.
pricing_important: Prices marked «Individual» are calculated by our partner firm case by case depending on circumstances. We do not sell consulate queue slots or invitations.
pricing_safe_desc: Przelewy24 — licensed payment operator in Poland · Card data not stored on our servers · SSL 256-bit encryption

sq_5_label: I don't know where to start

ai_greeting:
Hi! 👋 I am your personal AI assistant from Kompas Migracji.

To help you as quickly as possible and pass the case to our lawyer, please describe your situation. What questions regarding legalization or documents are you interested in?
ai_error: Sorry, an error occurred. Please contact us on WhatsApp: +48 729 271 848
ai_no_conn: No connection. Please contact us on WhatsApp: +48 729 271 848
ai_desc: Our intelligent assistant collects necessary information so the lawyer can immediately offer you an optimal action plan.
ai_f1_desc: All data is protected and not transferred to third parties.
ai_f2_desc: Saves time on basic questions. The lawyer receives a ready summary.
ai_f3_desc: According to current Polish migration law.
ai_placeholder: Describe your situation or ask a question...
ai_policy: By pressing Enter, you agree to the personal data processing policy.
bot_greeting:
Hi! I am the Kompas Migracji AI assistant 👋

I will help with questions about Residence Cards, legalization, and our services.

Choose a topic or write your question:
bot_footer: Powered by Claude AI · Kompas Migracji
admin_motivate_msg: You are doing a great job! 🚀
faq_panic_q_0: I am in panic and do not know what to do. Where to start?
faq_panic_a_0: Take one step — write us on WhatsApp or call. We will figure out where to start. The first consultation is free.
faq_panic_q_1: I have no money. Can you help me?
faq_panic_a_1: Yes. We start with a free 2-minute assessment. We have an installment system for difficult cases.
faq_panic_q_2: I got a refusal for Karta Pobytu. Is this the end?
faq_panic_a_2: No. You have 14 days to appeal. Contact us as soon as possible.
review_olena_text: Helped me get my residence card despite initial refusal. Highly recommended!
first_steps_title: What to do in the first 24 hours
first_steps_desc: If you just arrived in Poland and don't know what to do — this is for you
team_bio_1: 10 years in Polish migration law. Personally leads every consultation and always answers the phone.
team_bio_2: Founder of Kompas Migracji — a one-stop shop for solving all bureaucratic tasks for foreigners in the EU.
fs_s1_d: WhatsApp, Viber or phone — we reply within 2 hours. You can write in English, Ukrainian or Russian.
fs_s2_d: Passport, birth certificate, temporary protection (if any). If documents are missing, we will help you get them.
fs_s3_d: A 2-minute conversation is enough for us to tell you what to do and how much it costs. No obligations.
fs_s4_d: You will receive a clear plan: what, when, and in what order. No surprises and hidden costs.
fs_s5_d: We guide you step by step. We are in touch at every stage and inform you about the progress.
fs_footer: Free · No obligations · We reply within 2h
guar_i1_d: Your data is protected according to GDPR. We never share client information with third parties.
guar_i2_d: We operate exclusively within Polish and European law. Zero corruption, zero shortcuts.
guar_i3_d: The price is agreed before work starts. No hidden fees and surprises at the end.
guar_i4_d: We reply within 2 hours on business days. You are updated on every step of your case.
guar_fail_title: Can't we help? We'll tell you honestly.
guar_fail_desc: If your situation requires other specialists, we will refer you to the right people. Your well-being is more important to us than profit.
rev1_t: The employer refused to pay a salary for two months. Thanks to the consultation and a correct request - I got every penny. Thank you!
rev2_t: Stopped by the police, they wanted to take my license due to a system error. Oleksandr reacted quickly - I kept my license. Saved the situation in one day.
rev3_t: After a divorce, we couldn't agree on child support. Legal help let us find a solution without a court - peacefully and fairly for both sides.
rev4_t: A disputed inheritance between relatives dragged on for months. Oleksandr organized everything and we finally agreed. Highly recommend.

ExitPopup.title: Don't face this alone
ExitPopup.subtitle: Leave your email — we will contact you and provide a free assessment of your situation

ExitPopup.disclaimer: No spam. Just a reply about your situation.
ExitPopup.success_title: Thank you! We will contact you
ExitPopup.success_subtitle: Expect a message within 2 hours during business hours
